app.title: OmniCorp
app.subtitle: Secure development training simulator
mission.first.title: Read the request
mission.first.description: A service console shows a response from an internal training app.
mission.first.objective: Reach the terminal and inspect the response headers.
mission.first.near_terminal: Press E to inspect the terminal
mission.first.wrong: This header is not the issue. Try another one.
mission.first.report:
1. Content-Type: text/html
2. Set-Cookie: session=demo; HttpOnly
3. X-Debug-Token: dev-admin-override
4. Cache-Control: no-store
mission.first.report_completed:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Type: text/html
Set-Cookie: session=demo; HttpOnly
X-Debug-Token: dev-admin-override
Cache-Control: no-store
ui.hint.move: Move with WASD or arrow keys
ui.hint.interact: Press E to inspect the object
